title: Deployment Event
description: Canonical schema for deployment lifecycle events used to compute Deployment Frequency, Lead Time, Change Failure Rate, and Time to Restore.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of the schema. Minor bumps for backward-compatible additions; major bumps for breaking changes.

event_type.description: Discriminant for event routing. Must be 'deployment'.

service.description: Service or component name within the repository.

commit_sha.description: Full SHA of the deployed commit.

deployed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the deployment completed.

pipeline_url.description: Link to the CI/CD pipeline run that performed the deployment.

deploy_duration_seconds.description: Total wall-clock time the deployment took, in seconds.

ai_assisted.description: Whether AI tooling was involved in the deployment process.
